name: golang-code.cloudfoundry-bytefmt-dev
title: golang-code.cloudfoundry-bytefmt-dev
description:
Human readable byte formatter
This package provides a Go module to easily format Byte sizes in a way easily
readable by humans. Currently it is able to handle T: Terabyte, G: Gigabyte,
M: Megabyte, K: Kilobyte and B: Byte.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-code.cloudfoundry-bytefmt-dev because Human readable byte formatter.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-code.cloudfoundry-bytefmt-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-code.cloudfoundry-bytefmt-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-code.cloudfoundry-bytefmt-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
